info.name: 🧹 Cleaning Platform — Full API Collection
info.description:
## Cleaning Platform — Microservice API Collection

Covers all **5 services** (IAC, Property, Pricing, Order, Booking).

### How to use
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set collection variables (see `Variables` tab):
   - `iacUrl`      → `http://localhost:18080`
   - `propertyUrl` → `http://localhost:18081`
   - `pricingUrl`  → `http://localhost:18082`
   - `orderUrl`    → `http://localhost:18083`
   - `bookingUrl`  → `http://localhost:18090`
3. Run **Login as Super Admin** or **Register** — tokens are auto-saved
4. Every authenticated folder inherits Bearer auth from `{{accessToken}}`

### Token Flow
Every login/register/refresh request automatically runs a Post-Response Script that:
- Saves `accessToken` → used by all authenticated requests
- Saves `refreshToken` → used by the Refresh Token request

item.name: 🔐 IAC Service — Authentication
item.description: Register, login, token refresh, logout. Base URL: {{iacUrl}}

request.description: Creates a new user account with the default USER role. On success, tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.

exec: console.log('✅ Tokens saved. accessToken length:', json.data.accessToken.length);

request.description: Login with the default super admin account (seeded at startup). Tokens saved automatically.

exec: console.log('✅ Super Admin tokens saved successfully.');

request.description: Exchanges the current refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair (rotation).

response.name: 401 — Refresh token expired

request.description: Revokes all refresh tokens for the currently authenticated user.

exec: console.log('✅ Logged out. Tokens cleared from collection variables.');

request.description: Expects 400 — username too short, invalid email, password too weak.

response.name: 400 — Validation failed

item.name: 👤 IAC Service — Users
item.description: User profile and administration. Base URL: {{iacUrl}}

request.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

exec: console.log('Profile fetched for:', data.username, '| roles:', data.roles.join(', '));

request.description: Paginated list of all users. Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.
Fetch details for a specific user by UUID. Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.
Permanently deletes a user account. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

item.name: 🛡️ IAC Service — Admin / Role Management
item.description: Role assignment and revocation. Base URL: {{iacUrl}}. Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.

response.name: 400 — Protected role

item.name: 🏠 Property Service
item.description: Manage client properties. Base URL: {{propertyUrl}}. Requires ROLE_CLIENT.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Downtown Apartment",
  "type": "APARTMENT",
  "areaSqm": 75.5,
  "bathroomsCount": 1,
  "address": "123 King St W, Toronto, ON M5X 1A1",
  "notes": "Keypad code: 4821. Leave shoes at the door."
}

request.description: Creates a new property for the authenticated client. Type must be one of: APARTMENT, HOUSE, OFFICE.

exec: console.log('✅ Property created, id saved:', data.id);

response.name: 201 — Property created

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Suburban House",
  "type": "HOUSE",
  "areaSqm": 200.0,
  "bathroomsCount": 3,
  "address": "456 Maple Ave, Mississauga, ON L5A 2B1",
  "notes": "Dog is friendly."
}

{
  "name": "Downtown Apartment (Updated)",
  "type": "APARTMENT",
  "areaSqm": 80.0,
  "bathroomsCount": 2,
  "address": "123 King St W, Toronto, ON M5X 1A1",
  "notes": "Keypad 9999. Pet present."
}

request.description: Soft-deletes a property (sets active=false). Does not affect existing orders.

query.description: UUID of the client to verify ownership

request.description: Called internally by order-service to verify that a property belongs to the requesting client.

item.name: 💰 Pricing Service
item.description: Service catalog and price calculation. Base URL: {{pricingUrl}}. Catalog is public; calculation is open.

request.description: Returns all active cleaning service types with their base rates. Public endpoint — no auth required.

response.name: 200 — Service catalog

item.name: Calculate Price — Deep Clean with Addons

exec: pm.test('Returns 400 for unknown service type', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: 📋 Order Service — Client
item.description: Create, pay, list and cancel cleaning orders. Base URL: {{orderUrl}}. Requires ROLE_CLIENT.

request.description: Creates an order in PENDING status. Call /pay to confirm and trigger cleaner assignment.

exec: console.log('✅ Order created:', data.id, '| total:', data.totalPrice);

response.name: 201 — Order created (PENDING)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Order created. Complete payment to confirm.",
  "data": {
    "id": "ffffffff-aaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddddddddddd",
    "propertyId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
    "serviceTypeCode": "STANDARD",
    "addons": ["OVEN"],
    "frequency": "ONE_TIME",
    "scheduledDate": "2026-05-01T10:00:00",
    "status": "PENDING",
    "basePrice": 52.75,
    "addonsPrice": 40.00,
    "discountPercent": 0,
    "totalPrice": 92.75,
    "cleanerId": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-04-15T20:00:00"
  }
}

request.description: Simulates payment processing. Changes status PENDING→CONFIRMED and assigns a cleaner via Round-Robin.

item.name: 🧹 Order Service — Cleaner
item.description: Cleaner schedule, earnings and order actions. Base URL: {{orderUrl}}. Requires ROLE_CLEANER.

request.description: Returns upcoming CONFIRMED orders assigned to this cleaner.
Marks a CONFIRMED order as COMPLETED. Triggers earning record creation.
Returns total earnings for a specific month. Format: /earnings/{year}/{month}

item.name: 📖 Booking Service (via UI proxy :18090)
item.description: Booking Service — accessible through the UI gateway. Base URL: {{bookingUrl}}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "My Office",
  "type": "OFFICE",
  "areaSqm": 120.0,
  "bathroomsCount": 2,
  "address": "789 Bay St, Toronto, ON M5G 2C1",
  "notes": "Clean after 6pm."
}
